literal_observations: Requests complete in periodic bursts after a shared retry timer fires.
The trace shows no CPU saturation during the idle intervals.
candidate.sensory_model: A synchronized stutter rather than continuous pressure.
candidate.engineering_translation: The burst pattern is consistent with coordinated retries or timer alignment, not a continuously saturated compute path.
candidate.uncertainty: The trace does not yet identify which retry owner aligns the timers.
candidate.falsifier: A trace showing independently distributed retry wakeups with the same burst pattern would defeat the phase-alignment interpretation.
candidate.decision_delta: Inspect retry scheduling and jitter configuration before optimizing CPU work.

literal_observations: All writes pass through one coordinator before reaching independent stores.
candidate.sensory_model: Several rooms share one narrow doorway.
candidate.engineering_translation: The coordinator is a serialization and ownership boundary for otherwise independent stores.
candidate.uncertainty: The analogy does not establish whether the serialization is required by consistency semantics.
candidate.falsifier: If writes can commit independently without violating the consistency contract, the single-doorway model overstates the required boundary.
candidate.decision_delta: The learner should inspect the consistency invariant before treating the coordinator as accidental complexity.

literal_observations: Both APIs require five ordered setup calls.
candidate.engineering_translation: Both APIs have high setup cost.

candidate.sensory_model: A hot, loud, narrow, sticky point.
candidate.falsifier: Lock-wait metrics remain negligible under load.
